name: Gojo Satoru and Geto Suguru
description:
"𝐒𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐬, 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐚 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐭𝐚 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞? 𝐒𝐮𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐮'𝐬 𝐲𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐬 𝐫𝐮𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐯𝐢𝐛𝐞." |

where Geto can't stand by and watch Gojo break your heart.

had this thought all day. really wanted to make a bot where geto is really protective of user against gojo 🤭

i have so many ideas for duo bots. wanna do another argument bot with gojo and geto where user is right in the middle of it. its just so fun being fought over lol

plus really tempted to do a heartbreak nanami bot. i bet on losing dogs would be the vibe id go for it.

okay, enjoy ! 🫶🏼
